heading: Art exhibits
label: 2134 Art exhibits
text: No work of art or manufacture other than the property of the United States shall be exhibited in the National Statuary Hall, the Rotunda, Emancipation Hall of the Capitol Visitor Center, or the corridors of the Capitol.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 189 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. Amendments2008— inserted “Emancipation Hall of the Capitol Visitor Center,” after “Rotunda,”.Pub. L. 110–437
